hash_contract.raw_schema_hash_algorithm: sha256(ordered sqlite_schema DDL rows joined with U+001F and LF; provenance only)
hash_contract.semantic_schema_hash_algorithm: v1 sha256(sorted object, column, foreign-key, and unique-constraint records; DDL text, column order, defaults, and non-unique indexes excluded)
hash_contract.capability_contract: request_attempts and eight request_logs lifecycle columns are one fail-closed optional capability
hash_contract.fixture_hash_algorithm: sha256(source.sqlite3 after deterministic sanitized canary insertion and WAL checkpoint)
hash_contract.profile_grouping: tags share a profile only when semantic base schema hashes are identical
